evals.prompt: Review this copied skill and adapt it to the current repository conventions.
evals.expected_output: A revised skill that matches the repo stack, paths, and commands.

task_framing_expectations.what: The revised skill makes the important actions concrete.
task_framing_expectations.why: The skill explains why those actions exist instead of listing raw steps.
task_framing_expectations.when: The skill states when to use key commands or actions.
task_framing_expectations.expected_outcome: The skill makes success criteria observable for important steps.

assertions: The revised skill removes stale stack references from the source project
The revised skill keeps the same core responsibility
The revised skill uses this repository's real commands or file paths where relevant

evals.prompt: Tighten this skill description so it triggers on realistic prompts without false-triggering on nearby tasks.
evals.expected_output: A more precise description plus justification for the new scope.

task_framing_expectations.what: The revision is clear about what change is being made.
task_framing_expectations.why: The response explains why the new wording improves trigger quality.
task_framing_expectations.when: The guidance indicates when the revised description should activate the skill.
task_framing_expectations.expected_outcome: The final description is more precise and easier to evaluate with trigger queries.

assertions: The new description is more specific about when to use the skill
The new description remains under the spec limit
The response explains at least one activation boundary
